---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. Why would it be useful?

**Example:**

I need to [do X] but currently [problem Y] prevents this. This feature would allow me to [benefit Z].

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution. Include API design if applicable.

**API Example:**

```rust
// Show how the API might look

```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

- [ ] I've searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] I've considered whether this fits the project's scope
- [ ] I'm willing to contribute to implementing this feature
